header.title: Rule Engine
header.subtitle: Configure conditions and effects for property tax calculation
header.autoSave: All changes are automatically saved to your browser • {count} rules saved

conditionRow.chooseField: Choose a field to specify values

saveReasonModal.title: Confirm Rule Configuration Save
saveReasonModal.description: Please enter a change description for audit history and version logs. This helps other administrators understand why this tax policy was created or updated.
saveReasonModal.placeholder: e.g. Updated tax rate formula for property zone modifiers

conditionGroup.conditionsMet: of the following conditions are met

stopProcessing.toggleHint: When enabled, no further rules will be evaluated after this rule matches
stopProcessing.warningText: Stop processing is active. Once this rule matches, subsequent rules will not be evaluated. Use this with caution in complex rule chains.
stopProcessing.exclusionReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Superseded by new ARV policy for residential zone
